Scenario Description: Verify login response includes all RBAC boolean flags
Pre-conditions: User 'admin' exists in DB with isadmin=True, user 'user1' exists with isadmin=False
Action Steps: 1. Send POST request to /api/auth/login with valid credentials. 2. Inspect the JSON response body.
Expected Result (Behavior): The 'user' object in the response must contain isadmin, can_view_templates, can_edit_template, can_delete_template, can_view_pdf, can_delete_pdf, can_create_pdf flags.

Pre-conditions: User 'admin' logs in, receives session cookie.
Action Steps: 1. Send GET request to /api/templates/ with admin session cookie.
Expected Result (Behavior): Request succeeds and returns a list of templates regardless of 'can_view_templates' flag.

Scenario Description: User cannot view templates without permission
Pre-conditions: User 'user1' logs in, receives session cookie. 'user1' has can_view_templates=False.
Action Steps: 1. Send GET request to /api/templates/ with user1 session cookie.
Expected Result (Behavior): Request is intercepted by require_view_templates dependency and blocked.

Scenario Description: User cannot create templates without permission
Action Steps: 1. Send POST request to /api/templates/ with valid template payload and user1 cookie.
Expected Result (Behavior): Request is intercepted by require_edit_template dependency and blocked.

Scenario Description: User cannot delete templates without permission
Action Steps: 1. Send DELETE request to /api/templates/{id} with user1 cookie.
Expected Result (Behavior): Request is intercepted by require_delete_template dependency and blocked.

Scenario Description: User can view stored PDFs with permission
Action Steps: 1. Send GET request to /api/pdf/stored with user1 cookie.
Expected Result (Behavior): Request succeeds and returns a list of stored PDFs.

Scenario Description: User cannot generate PDF without permission
Action Steps: 1. Send POST request to /api/pdf/generate with payload and user1 cookie.
Expected Result (Behavior): Request is intercepted by require_create_pdf dependency and blocked.

Scenario Description: User cannot delete PDF without permission
Action Steps: 1. Send DELETE request to /api/pdf/stored/{date}/{filename} with user1 cookie.
Expected Result (Behavior): Request is intercepted by require_delete_pdf dependency and blocked.

Action Steps: 1. Send GET request to /api/templates/ WITHOUT a session cookie.
Expected Result (Behavior): Request is blocked immediately by the core get_current_user dependency.
